1 = 1% to 25%, 2 = 26% to 50%, 3 = 51% to 75%, 4 = 76% to 100%, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
399 K6B K6B_FLUID_INTAKE (K6B) Fluid Intake Per Day CHAR 1 Oral/nutritional status: parenteral or enteral intake - average fluid intake (daily) in last 7 days. 0 = None, 1 = 1 to 500 cc/day, 2 = 501 to 1000 cc/day, 3 = 1001 to 1500 cc/day, 4 = 1501 to 2000 cc/day, 5 = 2001 or more cc/day, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
400 L1A L1A_DEBRIS_B4_BED (L1A) Debris Present in Mouth Prior to Going to Bed CHAR 1
